'''G-Station Seven''' was one of several [[Space station/Legends|space stations]] which [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Genesia]] before and during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] contact [[Plu Makor]] ran a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] [[Ship Shop G-S7|repair shop]] on G-Station Seven.
